Container.Name: broccoli_maestro-mcp
Container.Overview: Maestro MCP server for AI agent workflow optimization. Exposes a Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint at /mcp on port 3001. Provides 25 commands (diagnose, refine, fortify, streamline, and more), 10 tools, and 8 skill resources to help AI agents avoid common workflow anti-patterns with domain-specific guidance for prompt engineering, context management, tool orchestration, and agent architecture. Health check available at /health.

Config.Name: MCP HTTP Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 3001 — MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint at /mcp. Point your MCP client to http://<unraid-ip>:3001/mcp
